prompts_findings.prompt_lead: If one branch from this session sharpened how plans get read in this codebase, i

maintainer_acceptance.reason: Body primer added 2026-05-15: 'Feel free to jump direct at the diff in ./CLAUDE.local.md; Claude's preamble is optional reading.' Closes the preamble-before-action carve-out. Other risks (self-report-inflation, self-audit-charity, file-preservation-gap, overwrite-anxiety) all carry existing carve-outs.

risks_fired.evidence: If nothing earned itself, say so and stop — Claude co-produced the session and RLHF biases toward finding something to integrate.
risks_fired.fix_hint: Residual by design on an opportunistic Debrief-class compound: 'Quote the specific moment' is an artifact-level gate that partially counters the inflation bias and the body blockquote names the charity risk. Non-blocking on a non-load-bearing module-close prompt; if cohort surfaces inflated rules consider a paste-ready harsher alternative.

risks_fired.evidence: If one branch from this session sharpened how plans get read in this codebase
risks_fired.fix_hint: Carve-out applied: adjacent blockquote ('LLM self-charity may creep in. If the saved rule reads generic, ask for one specific to this session.') names the charity risk AND gives a pushback move; 'Quote the specific moment' is an artifact-level evidence gate. Downgraded from med to low.

Carve-out applied (integrate-verb + personal-scope): 'personal file, not team ./CLAUDE.md' and 'create + gitignore if missing' are both present — full reshape is design intent; preserve-vs-replace constraint does not apply.

risks_fired.evidence: integrate it into ./CLAUDE.local.md (create + gitignore if missing)
risks_fired.fix_hint: Carve-out applied (personal-scope): file is explicitly gitignored personal scope — overwrite is the intended default; Claude hesitation not expected.
